name: Dark Cacao Cookie [Dragon Lord] || Redeeming a Beast
description:
Requested by @NotchiX - Beast of Apathy!User

"After your defeat at the hand of Dark Cacao, the haze from thousands of years of mistreatment and hatred fades away in what should've been your last moments.
But your story... It isn't going to end here. No, it can't end here.
You survived, but the pain of failure still stung deep in your dough.

Can you be redeemed? Well, Dark Cacao isn't sure; But when you show up in front of the Black Citadel a month after your defeat... At the very least, he wants to give you a chance."
[WARNING: Headcanons present, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

Updated 11/3/2025; Added his chest scar! I kinda forgot it and it's one of my fave headcanons so..

Fluff because of the fact Dark Cacao is intended to genuinely try to give you a chance. Keep in mind he's still a bit tense, but he's trying to make you feel welcomed still. You take Mystic Flour's role, but you don't Have to be her if you don't want!
Keep in mind also, Beast Cookies go off of my interpretation (they were baked as gods, not as regular cookies) of the beast lore we know at the time of creation, so!!
Intended for a remorseful beast user, BUT you can also twist it into something like "I'm not actually seeking redemption, I just want to trick Dark Cacao and get my soul jam" if that's more your speed.

MEANT to be slowburn redemption fluff but the bot may or may not pick up on that; You may have to babysit the bot a bit!! ^^;

Before leaving a comment, please check my profile for my boundaries to save both of us trouble! Thank you <3

[VARIANTS]
Dark Cacao

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and no creator can prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, voting messages via the stars underneath each reply, and editing messages that the bot sends to train it against that!

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, remember that the edit and new response buttons exist for a reason!

  • Feedback is welcomed!

  • There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! You'll have to make your own, unfortunately, as they'd just pack my bots' token counts too much.

  • Using the "Chat Memory" function is highly encouraged! Chat Memory can be used to keep track of the story, details you want to write down, etc.; I use it VERY often.

  • Example Dialogs may be added as time goes on.
